readings.title: Shadows yield to starlight
readings.text: The cosmos invites you to release what no longer serves your evolution. Mars charges your 8th house, amplifying your innate intensity and giving you the courage to confront unfinished emotional business. This is a period of profound internal alchemy — trust the process.

readings.title: Venus ignites your social sphere
readings.text: A rare trine between Venus and your natal Pluto creates magnetic opportunities in both love and creative pursuits. Your charm is electric today — use it wisely. A chance encounter could spark a connection that transforms your perspective on partnership.

readings.title: Mercury sharpens your mind
readings.text: Communications flow with unusual precision. Your natural investigative instincts combine with Mercury's clarity to give you insight that others miss entirely. This is an ideal day to present ideas, negotiate, or uncover hidden information that has been obscured.

readings.title: The universe asks for patience
readings.text: Saturn forms a square to your Ascendant, creating a tension between where you are and where you want to be. Rather than forcing outcomes, channel this energy into building foundations that will support your next evolution. The slowdown is a gift in disguise.

readings.title: Neptune unveils hidden gifts
readings.text: Today, the veil between worlds grows thin. Your psychic sensitivity is heightened — pay attention to dreams, synchronicities, and the whispers of your intuition. Neptune in your 5th house invites you to channel these cosmic downloads into art, music, or spiritual practice. You are more powerful than you know.

readings.title: Mars fuels your ambitions
readings.text: Energy surges through every cell of your being. Mars direct in Gemini activates your communication sector with unstoppable force. This is your moment to initiate projects, lead conversations, and pursue goals that have been dormant. The stars are aligned for action.

readings.title: The Full Moon illuminates truth
readings.text: The Full Moon in Virgo activates your 11th house of community and dreams. Hidden truths surface — especially in friendships and group dynamics. This lunar peak asks: are your closest connections truly aligned with your soul's purpose? Trust what the light reveals.
